shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "pwd && rg --files -g '"'!*node_modules*'"' | head -80 && rg -n \"getComputedStyle|direction|rtl|RightToLeft|dir\" src test tests packages 2>/dev/null | head -200"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,220p' src/components/LightboxRoot.tsx && sed -n '1,180p' src/hooks/index.ts 2>/dev/null || true && rg -n \"useRTL|LightboxRoot\" src test/unit"
/bin/bash -lc "find src/hooks src/components src/contexts -maxdepth 2 -type f -print | sort | xargs -r -n1 sh -c 'echo === "'$0; sed -n "1,180p" "$0"'"'"
/bin/bash -lc "git branch -a && git log --all -S'MutationObserver' --oneline -- src | head -20 && git show 506168e:src/components/LightboxRoot.tsx | sed -n '1,120p'"
/bin/bash -lc "nl -ba src/components/LightboxRoot.tsx | sed -n '8,42p'; nl -ba test/unit/RTL.spec.ts | sed -n '142,176p'; git status --short"
